brief_notes: Comprehensive DTI prediction paper with strong contributions on both the dataset side (685K interactions from 13 sources, 100x expansion) and the model side (3D structural representations with bilinear attention). The evaluation across transductive/semi-inductive/fully inductive splits is rigorous, and experimental validation (76% top-50 confirmation) adds substantial credibility. Well-organized ablation study quantifies each component's contribution. Minor weaknesses include limited discussion of negative sampling strategy details and potential data leakage across the 13 aggregated sources.
